---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an enhancement to thClaws
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the use case, not just the solution you have in mind.

## Proposed solution

How would you like thClaws to handle this?

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Scope

- [ ] Core agent loop
- [ ] Provider (Anthropic / OpenAI / Gemini / DashScope / Ollama / Agentic Press)
- [ ] GUI (desktop app)
- [ ] CLI / REPL
- [ ] Tools (Read / Write / Edit / Bash / etc.)
- [ ] Skills / Plugins / MCP
- [ ] KMS
- [ ] Team coordination
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, links to related projects, prior art.
